title: techmap creates $_MUX_ cell with 1'bx input (correct, but less efficient)

features.name: parallel_case with 1'b1 expression and x-default
features.description: Code should include a case statement with parallel_case attribute and 1'b1 as the case expression, where the default branch assigns 1'bx

features.name: mux_cell_with_x_input
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer cell (($_MUX_)) that receives 1'bx as a data input, which should be optimized away but is not
features.snippet:
($_MUX_(data0, data1, sel)
data0 = 1'bx; // should be optimized
